summary: Backend + mobile-web UI retest for Custom World lightweight implementation. Backend pytest: 29/30 pass with one reproducible persistence regression. Frontend custom setup and preset flow verified on public preview URL.

critical.issue: custom_world_setup seeding does not consistently persist object_locations when carried items are provided; simulation_hooks/world_instability/relationship_threads are present but object_locations can be empty.

issues: Console warning persists: props.pointerEvents is deprecated; migrate to style.pointerEvents.

action_items: Fix _seed_custom_setup_into_rolling in backend/server.py so object_locations is seeded whenever carried items are parsed, even if inventory_objects already exists from model output.
Add a backend regression assertion ensuring inventory_objects/object_locations are both non-empty for custom carried setup.
Optionally clean deprecated pointerEvents usage warning in frontend animated view layer.
critical_code_review_comments: RCA: _seed_custom_setup_into_rolling currently gates both inventory_objects and object_locations under `if carried and not out.get('inventory_objects')`. If LLM emits inventory_objects but omits object_locations, seeding path is skipped and object_locations remains empty.
State supremacy and object permanence guard functions pass deterministic method-level tests.
Mechanic concealment held under probe action; narrative did not leak roll/modifier/trigger/debug/JSON terms.

success_rate.frontend: 100% for requested UI/integration checks (custom setup visibility+inputs, custom start flow, preset regression flow)

seed_data_creation: Ephemeral TEST_* sessions created by pytest fixtures and deleted in teardown; UI runs created visible save slots but no manual DB seed scripts added.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only failing test: test_custom_setup_persisted_to_protected_rolling_fields. Repro is stable. Use public URL from frontend/.env. Custom flow on web preview is operational and returns 2-4 paragraphs + 4-6 choices.
rca_of_issue: Reproduction: create story with custom_world_setup.carried populated -> call export endpoint -> rolling_state has simulation_hooks/world_instability/relationship_threads but object_locations may be []. Root cause is conditional seeding tied to absence of inventory_objects. Mitigation: seed object_locations independently and merge/de-duplicate against existing list by object key/status.
